params.name: Horoscope
params.source: Lottery Machine (0.07%), Nebula Chest (2%), Novice Scrolls (1%), Wishing (2.1%)
params.description:
On Feb 20, 1459 BC, the Old Babylonian Empire drew this early astronomical map.

Babylonian priest, Sarikranu, discovered a dazzling star in the west and engraved what he saw on the stone for divination and prophecy. THe prophecy said a holy king would be born in the west. A few years later, traveling merchants from Greece delivered the news that on the day when the star appeared, a new Mycenaean prince was born. His name was Agamemnon. 

[Calculation System]
